name: My boss is pressuring me not to file after I got hurt in Taylorsville, is that legal?
description: Illegal—Utah bans retaliation; document and report claim.[1]

mainEntity.name: My boss is pressuring me not to file after I got hurt in Taylorsville, is that legal?

acceptedAnswer.text: Illegal—Utah bans retaliation; document and report claim.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: No, Utah law prohibits retaliation or interference with claims; fines up to $5,000.[1] Report anyway.[1] Key factors: Can't fire solely for filing if able to work; ADA may protect if disabled.[2] Document threats; report to Labor Commission.[1] Lawyer prevents coercion.[1]
